title: Blood type genetics
script_summary: Explore the intricate science of blood type genetics and what it really means.

segments.voiceover: Ever wondered why your blood type matters? It’s more than just a letter.
Blood types are determined by genetics, influenced by our parents’ genes.
But it’s not just simple inheritance. A, B, AB, and O types can mix and match!
Research shows blood types can affect disease risk and transfusion compatibility.
But here’s the twist: scientists are still uncovering the full story!
So, your blood type could shape more than you think. It’s a genetic puzzle!
Want to dive deeper into blood type mysteries? Hit follow for more science insights!
